description_long: This is a military-style attack helicopter with a streamlined, angular fuselage painted in a camouflage green and brown color scheme. It features a prominent main rotor with four long, dark blades and a tail rotor with four shorter blades mounted on a vertical fin. The cockpit is heavily armored with multiple angular, tinted windows, and the nose is equipped with sensors and weaponry, including a visible cannon and missile pods on either side. The landing gear consists of two robust, tubular skids with crossbars for stability. The helicopter's body is constructed primarily from metal alloys, with some composite and glass components, and it is designed for both speed and maneuverability in urban or combat environments. No visible registration numbers or civilian markings are present, emphasizing its military function.
description: A camouflaged military attack helicopter with a four-blade main rotor, armored cockpit, weapon pods, and sturdy landing skids.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular cockpit windows, nose-mounted sensors, and weapon pods on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, main and tail rotors, and the full length of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit, weapon pods, and rotor assemblies.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, colored dark gray or black, with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Four-blade tail rotor mounted vertically on the tail fin, colored black, with no visible protective shroud or markings.
attribute_landing_skids: Two tubular metal landing skids, painted in camouflage green, with crossbars for structural support and stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple angular cockpit windows, tinted blue-gray, arranged in a wraparound configuration with visible metal framing.
